current_suggestion.pitch: Your poker diet is heavily GTO-focused (GTO Wizard, GTO Lab, Jared Alderman), but Bart Hansen's Crush Live Poker channel steelmans the exploitative, live-game angle that pure GTO content largely ignores — specifically how population tendencies, player reads, and bet sizing deviate from solver outputs in real-world cash games. He does solo hand breakdowns and call-in shows where he works through specific live situations with callers, giving you a grounded counterweight to the theoretical framework you're already building. The depth is serious and practical without being beginner-level.

history: TEDx Talks – Russ Roberts (EconTalk host solo appearances)
EP Wealth Advisors (with Ben Felix-style rigor — try 'The Plain Bagel' instead)
Odyssey of the Mind (William MacAskill / 80,000 Hours)
